actions.intent: Open the central choke around the lower puppy instead of collecting side value.
Cut the lower-left vine access and keep the urgent route moving.
Bring the lower puppy to one-clear-away while managing dock pressure.
Use the central mixed-blocker clear to extract the lower puppy and open the upper branch.
Take the upper branch route rather than broad clearing after the first rescue.
Finish the upper puppy and complete the midpoint exam path.
Cash the planned dock clear before extracting the lower puppy.
Extract the lower puppy after the dock recovery beat.
Finish the upper puppy and complete the midpoint exam path.

notes: Designer-approved midpoint exam path: central choke first, lower urgent target, then a clean pivot to upper.
